summary.intent: Implement CHA-19 (P1.12: Web UI — CRM tab) for the moltis project — building a frontend CRM tab on top of an already-complete Rust/SQLite CRM backend, as part of an autonomous Stokowski pipeline (CEO review → eng review → implement stages).
summary.outcome: CEO review and engineering review stages completed and posted to Linear; implementation stage started with feature branch created and Phase 1 Rust changes to templates.rs begun (adding crm to SpaRoutes, NavCounts, GonData). The transcript ends mid-implementation before Phase 2 JS work.

repo: All CRM data access goes via WebSocket RPC (sendRpc()) — 14 methods already registered in gateway/src/methods/services.rs — no REST endpoints needed for the UI
The channels page (page-channels.js) is the canonical reference pattern for new feature tabs: sendRpc for all ops, signal() for state, Preact/HTM components, registerPrefix for sub-routes
Routes are injected from Rust via gon (window.__MOLTIS__) using SpaRoutes struct in templates.rs — all route paths come from the server, not hardcoded in JS
NavCounts badge IDs are defined in nav-counts.js and counts are injected via gon at page load from build_nav_counts() which uses tokio::join! for concurrent queries
i18n uses lazy-loaded namespace bundles — each feature registers its namespace in i18n.js with a dynamic import loader pointing to locales/{en,fr,zh}/*.js
Feature gating uses #[cfg(feature = "crm")] in gateway; web side should add crm_enabled: bool to GonData matching graphql_enabled/voice_enabled pattern
PII fields (email, phone) are Secret<String> in CRM types — LiveCrmService explicitly calls expose_secret() in contact_to_json() for intentional serialization to authenticated users
CRM migrations use ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE (upsert pattern) and ON DELETE SET NULL for matter→contact FK (matters survive contact deletion by design)
CRM LIKE search in SqliteCrmStore.list_filtered does NOT escape % and _ wildcards — low severity since single-tenant but worth noting

code.finding: SpaRoutes struct — add crm: &'static str field here for gon route injection
NavCounts struct — add crm: usize field; build_nav_counts() uses tokio::join! for concurrent DB queries
All 14 CRM RPC methods registered here: crm.contacts.list/get/upsert/delete, crm.channels.list/upsert/delete, crm.matters.list/get/upsert/delete, crm.interactions.list/record/delete
CrmService trait + NoopCrmService default impl; GatewayServices.crm: Arc<dyn CrmService>
LiveCrmService: contact_to_json(), matter_to_json(), interaction_to_json() all call expose_secret() on PII fields — already safe for API serialization

workflow: The Stokowski pipeline runs CEO review → eng review → implement as sequential autonomous agent stages, with each stage posting to Linear as a persistent workpad
The CEO review incorrectly recommended REST endpoints; the eng review caught this by examining actual code — reading the codebase before planning prevented ~15 unnecessary Rust handlers
ctx_batch_execute MCP tool failed repeatedly with relative path issues; direct Read tool calls with absolute paths were reliable — prefer Read over batch for file reading
AskUserQuestion tool calls in headless sessions are denied; the agent must make architectural decisions autonomously and document them clearly for the human gate reviewer
QA test plan artifacts are written to ~/.gstack/projects/<project>/ directory for consumption by downstream /qa pipeline stages

friction: ctx_batch_execute MCP tool consistently failed with 'No such file or directory' when using relative paths — required falling back to individual Read tool calls with absolute paths
AskUserQuestion was denied (headless mode) mid-CEO-review during mode selection — required proceeding with autonomous decisions and documenting them for human gate reviewer
navPanel navigation is dynamically rendered in JS (not static HTML), making it unclear at CEO review time where to add the CRM nav-link — required deeper exploration to resolve
Context window exhausted mid-implementation requiring a session continuation with full state summary — lost momentum at the critical Phase 1 implementation point
Linear API key had to be accessed via Bash env var inspection since MCP tools for Linear weren't available in the sandbox
open_items: Phase 1 Rust changes to templates.rs are incomplete — build_nav_counts() CRM count query and GonData crm_enabled field still need to be added
Phase 2 JS implementation not started: page-crm.js (contact list, detail, CRUD modals), locales/en/fr/zh crm.js, app.js import, index.html modulepreload, nav-counts.js badge ID, i18n.js namespace
E2E Playwright tests deferred to separate PR — 13 test specs defined in eng review but not implemented
Optimistic locking for concurrent CRM updates (last-write-wins is current behavior) — P2, Size M
Matter kanban drag-and-drop view — P3, Size L, deferred from v1
Contact merge/dedup across channels — P2, Size L, future phase
Search LIKE wildcard escaping (% and _ not escaped in SqliteCrmStore.list_filtered) — P3, cosmetic
Contact count optimization: build_nav_counts loads all contacts to count them — add SELECT COUNT(*) method when perf warrants
French and Chinese CRM locale translations — locale files to be created with English fallback, proper translations separate i18n pass
PR not yet created — branch CHA-19-web-ui-crm-tab exists but implementation incomplete and PR not pushed
